settings.primary_content: Our pieces are crafted with premium quality fabrics. To preserve their beauty and longevity, store them in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Avoid extreme temperatures that could alter colors or cause shrinkage.
settings.secondary_content: Dry cleaning is recommended for delicate pieces. If hand washing, use cold water with a gentle detergent. Iron on low heat with the garment turned inside out. Avoid the dryer to extend the life of your piece.
settings.tertiary_content: Each hand-dyed piece is unique. Natural color variations may occur between items and even within the same garment. This is the signature of our artisanal process. Hand-dyed products may slightly bleed during the first wash.
settings.quaternary_content: We select natural and sustainable fabrics for our creations. Check the garment label for exact composition details. Our materials are chosen for their quality, comfort, and environmental respect.

settings.heading: Complete Your Look
settings.description: Explore our full collection of premium hijabs and modest fashion pieces. Find the perfect complement to your wardrobe with our carefully curated selection.

We want you to love your purchase! 30-day return policy on unworn, unwashed items with original tags. Easy exchange process for different colors or styles. Full refund or store credit available. Contact our customer care team at Afinahcloset@gmail.com for assistance. Your satisfaction is our priority.

Free Standard Shipping on all orders over $75 within the US. Standard Shipping: 5-7 business days. Express Shipping: 2-3 business days (additional fee). International Shipping: Available to select countries. All orders are carefully packaged to ensure your items arrive in perfect condition.

Size: One size fits all. Dimensions: Specify length x width, e.g., 70" x 28". Weight: Lightweight and easy to style. Fit: Suitable for all head sizes and styling preferences. Versatility: Can be styled in multiple ways for different looks.
Free shipping on orders over $75. Easy 30-day returns. We want you to love your purchase!

Experience luxury and comfort with this premium hijab from Afinah Closet. Expertly crafted from the finest fabrics, this piece offers an elegant drape that moves beautifully throughout your day. The breathable material ensures all-day comfort while maintaining a sophisticated, polished look. Perfect for everyday wear, special occasions, or professional settings. Each hijab is carefully selected to meet our high standards of quality and style.

Fabric Type: Premium Modal/Chiffon/Rayon - specify based on product. Features: Soft, breathable, and lightweight with excellent drape. Opacity: Non-transparent for complete coverage. Texture: Smooth finish with natural sheen. Quality: Premium grade fabric that maintains its beauty wash after wash.

To keep your hijab looking beautiful: Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent. Hang to dry away from direct sunlight. Do not bleach or use harsh chemicals. Iron on low heat if needed, or steam gently. Store folded or hung to prevent wrinkles. With proper care, your hijab will maintain its quality and elegance for years to come.

settings.heading: Everything You Need to Know
settings.description: The fashion industry can have one of the world’s most powerful impact for social and environmental progress.

settings.text: The quality is absolutely amazing! The fabric is so soft and breathable. I've been wearing it all week and it still looks brand new. Afinah Closet has become my go-to for hijabs.

settings.text: I love how elegant and versatile this hijab is. It drapes beautifully and stays in place all day. The customer service was excellent too. Highly recommend!

settings.text: Afinah Closet never disappoints. This is my third purchase and I'm always impressed by the quality and fast shipping. These hijabs are perfect for both everyday wear and special occasions.
